title: androcalva stowardii
intro: Androcalva stowardii, also known as the Stoward's androcalva, is a type of plant native to Australia and is a member of the Cunoniaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Androcalva stowardii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Androcalva stowardii can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations for topical application.
